locations.summary: 普林塞萨港地下河国家公园（英語：Puerto Princesa Subterranean River National Park），台湾譯作公主港地下河國家公園，為菲律宾一處自然保护区，位於菲律賓島群呂宋部份西南部的巴拉望島。該公園於19…

relations.subject: Palawan blue flycatcher
relations.evidence: The species inhabits tropical moist lowland primary forest and secondary forest up to 1,000 meters above sea level. It is assessed as near threatened under the IUCN with populations believed to be decreasing due to habitat loss and deforestation

relations.subject: Palawan blue flycatcher
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
